hypothesis: Adding a physics-informed temporal consistency regularizer based on LEONARDO-predicted motion priors during SAM-EM fine-tuning will reduce identity-switch events by at least 50% (measured as switches per particle per minute) in high-density (≥5 particles in a 256×256 nm field) low-SNR LPTEM videos at ≥150 nm liquid thickness compared to the current SAM-EM.
